title: Property Consultant - Sunteck Realty - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Sunteck Realty - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Sunteck Realty, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!
